emails.subject: FW: 3-29-02 Gas Cash.xls
emails.body: FW: 3-29-02 Gas Cash.xls I assume ENA gets credited with the oney wired in on Friday re Centana. What's the status on the wire going out today. Do you have a cash request completed? Let me know this morning. Thanks.

emails.subject: RE: 3-29-02 Gas Cash.xls
emails.body: The answer is yes. Money was received Friday and Doug should be getting approval to send the other out today.

emails.subject: RE: 3-29-02 Gas Cash.xls
emails.body: Great. Can you e-mail the cash request you sent to doug?

emails.subject: FW: 3-29-02 Gas Cash.xls
emails.body: o:\gas structuring\centana_duke\CIPCO Payment Request(escrow) You will also find the other request associated with Centana.
